name: Churu Bites Dog Treats – Chicken Recipe Wraps
shortDescription: Churu Bites Chicken Recipe Wraps Chicken Recipe are soft, grain-free dog treats with a creamy Churu center, 72% moisture, and low calories perfect for training and fussy eaters.
description: Churu Bites Dog Treats Chicken Recipe Wraps Chicken Recipe are soft, savory, pillow-shaped treats made with high-quality ingredients you can trust. Crafted with farm-raised chicken and filled with INABA’s irresistible Churu creamy center, these bite-sized snacks deliver twice the texture dogs love soft on the outside with a smooth, creamy filling inside. Each treat begins with a gently baked chicken paste that is grain-free and free from preservatives, carrageenan, and artificial colors , making it a wholesome choice for dogs of all ages. With 72% moisture , Churu Bites help support daily hydration, while their low-calorie formulation (about 16 kcal per pack ) makes them ideal for training, rewarding, or everyday treating. Perfectly portioned and easy to serve by hand, Churu Bites are especially popular with fussy eaters and can even be used to discreetly hide medication. Enriched with Vitamin E for immune support and Green Tea Extract as an antioxidant , these treats offer both great taste and nutritional benefits in every bite. Key Benefits Made with farm-raised chicken and quality ingredients Double-texture design : soft baked exterior with creamy Churu filling Grain-free and free from preservatives, carrageenan, and artificial colors 72% moisture to support hydration Low-calorie treat (approx. 16 kcal per pack) Vitamin E for immune health and Green Tea Extract for antioxidant support Ideal for training, rewarding, and pill administration Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only; not intended as a complete meal Always provide clean, fresh drinking water Consult your veterinarian regularly for your dog’s health Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening Serve as soon as possible after opening Nutritional Information (Guaranteed Analysis) Crude Protein (min): 22.0% Crude Fat (min): 3.0% Crude Fiber (max): 0.5% Moisture (max): 72.0% Vitamin E (min): 80 IU/kg Calorie Content: 1300 kcal/kg, approx. 15.6 kcal per pack
